summary: Made two surgical opening edits to align chapter 13 with the boundary context: Della now explicitly returns to Old Sion after the prior chapter's night scene, and the coffin exposure now matches the already-visible lid from chapter 12. The chapter's closing already handed off cleanly into chapter 14, so no exit rewrite was needed.
edits: Clarified that Della is coming back up from Cedar Bench, preserving the overnight transition from chapter 12.
Corrected the coffin description so the lid had already shown the night before, instead of newly reducing it to only an exposed edge.
